segments.text: Vindicate me, O God, and plead my cause against an ungodly nation; rescue me from deceitful and wicked men.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: a man of deceit and iniquity

segments.text: For you are the God of my strength; why have you rejected me? Why do I go mourning because of the oppression of the enemy?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Send out your light and your truth; let them lead me; let them bring me to your holy hill and to your dwelling!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Then I will go to the altar of God, to God my exceeding joy, and I will praise you with the lyre, O God, my God.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: my exceeding joy: Heb. the gladness of my joy

segments.text: Why are you cast down, O my soul, and why are you in turmoil within me? Hope in God; for I shall again praise him, my salvation and my God.
segments.speaker: David
